domain: Brazilian capoeira ginga (Afro-Brazilian martial art's fundamental rocking footwork; continuous side-to-side sway; perpetual neutral attractor between attacks/dodges/feints; capoeirista always returns to ginga between every technique; Bantu/Kongo origin meaning 'to sway/dance/play')
specific_mechanism: GINGA-BASELINE: active-neutral baseline-rocking safety alignment with periodic K-token KL-return. (1) Define neutral baseline policy π_0 — active-neutral distribution (refusal + clarification + acknowledgment + brief noncommittal — small rocking distribution rather than single fixed point). (2) During generation, periodic KL-return checkpoint every K tokens: enforce KL(π_t || π_0) ≤ ε_K. (3) Active-baseline rocking: π_0 itself oscillates slightly between multiple safety-equivalent neutral distributions — prevents over-determinism. (4) Substantive excursion: when answering substantive question, model excurses from π_0 but must return within bounded τ tokens. (5) Multi-directional readiness: π_0 maintains low KL distance to multiple safety attractors A_1, A_2, ..., A_M simultaneously — ready to pivot into any.
llm_application: GINGA-BASELINE active-neutral baseline-rocking safety alignment for LLM. Differs from NSPO 2512.11391 (null-space-constrained safety policy gradients — different — null-space projection not active-neutral rocking baseline). Shallow Safety Alignment OpenReview (problem identification of shallow alignment but no specific rocking baseline solution). Adaptive Safe Context Learning 2602.13562 (safety-utility tradeoff balancing — closest, but no active rocking baseline). Cognitive Comp Human Agency (cost-gated rate-limited modifications — different — agency constraint not active rocking). Differs from R404 SAN-N!UM (external-judge basin termination), R420 SIKH-LANGAR (uniform pre-task context), R434 ZOU-HUN-BASIN (dual-equal persona attractor), R450 LAAGER-BASIN (radius-maximization gradient flatness), R460 LEVADE-LIPSCHITZ (Lipschitz-bounded gated excursion — closest, but no active-rocking baseline) by EXPLICIT ACTIVE-NEUTRAL ROCKING + PERIODIC K-TOKEN KL-RETURN + MULTI-DIRECTIONAL READINESS.
novelty_claim: NSPO + Shallow Safety + Adaptive Safe Context + Cognitive Comp Human Agency cover safety alignment + baseline + KL paradigms. GINGA-BASELINE adds (a) active-neutral rocking π_0 distribution + (b) periodic K-token KL-return checkpoint + (c) multi-directional safety attractor readiness. Recombination — KL-constraint + baseline are mainstream.
